name: Regis Resources Limited
analysis: RRL's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 35% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.9× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$6.3700, stop A$5.2817, target A$7.2100 (0.77:1) — then trail it.
